title: The Road to Atlas
content: The pieces are starting to fit together. You have the names, the schemes, and the faces of the muscle protecting the truth.||But Vane’s death wasn't just about money. It was about silence. To break that silence, you need to confront the man at the top. The Atlas CEO is your next target, but you’ll need a foolproof plan to get him to talk.||Prepare yourself, Detective. The corporate maze is about to become a battleground.
